content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Direct policy, fetch, robots, parse, extract, frontier, render, audit, storage, and report dependencies through narrow typed ports.

hints: For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Directed Ports model · Theory Directed Ports, name the owner, authorization, source and emitted revision, Node, TypeScript, URL, robots, unknown value, Fetch, Promise, AbortSignal, browser, accessibility, report, handle, recovery, and native-transfer boundary, Directed Ports precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Directed Ports model · Theory Directed Ports, trace this concrete input and predict values, errors, blocking, and output before reviewing it: A theory TypeScript team handles case 6163 during a hostile redirect, stream, and checkpoint drill. Build deterministic TypeScript evidence to prove port direction, admitted values, Promise and AbortSignal ownership, and handle-clean lifecycle; release evidence binds source, compiler, emitted JavaScript, lockfile, package, browser revision, container, configuration, and restored state; then change one owner permission, seed, URL, robots, sitemap, redirect, DNS, media, or encoding decision and reconcile provenance. Browser TypeScript uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, Fetch, streams, Cheerio, Playwright, axe-core, files, processes, packages, containers, assistive-technology review, load, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Direct policy, fetch, robots, parse, extract, frontier, render, audit, storage, and report dependencies through narrow typed ports.

For Authorized site auditing and TypeScript Defend the Directed Ports model · Theory Directed Ports, challenge the documented misconception with runtime, failure, race, or toolchain evidence: An interface around every function automatically creates sound architecture.

checks.description: The cumulative typescript portfolio contains this competency’s named evidence increment.
checks.failureMessage: Add the exact evidence marker // Evidence: crawler-ts-directed-ports-6q6w43.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: crawler-ts-directed-ports-6q6w43(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?function\s+evidence_crawler_ts_directed_ports_6q6w43\s*\([^)]*\)\s*:\s*Readonly<\{[^}]+\}>\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?ownedResources < 12)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?settledResources < 12 \|\| settledResources > ownedResources)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?abortCases < 6)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?leakedHandles > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
